# Instructions For GitHub Copilot

- After code changes, run `yarn format` to fix formatting before committing
- Commits must follow Conventional Commits format (e.g., `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`)
- Run `yarn test` after changes to verify nothing is broken
- Run `yarn lint` to check for linting issues; `yarn lint:fix` to auto-fix
- Make PR body concise and to the point, summarizing key changes and their purpose
- See AGENTS.md for full codebase context
